title: Islamian Computing Society (IIUI) X Combine Foundation MOU
paragraphs: Islamian Computing Society represents students interested in computing, technology, and digital innovation at the International Islamic University Islamabad (IIUI). The society aims to enhance technical, professional, and leadership capabilities of its members through seminars, workshops, coding competitions, gaming events, and skill development sessions in emerging technologies such as Artificial Intelligence (AI), Web Development, Cybersecurity, and Programming.

This collaboration is established to provide selected computer science students with free or discounted access to future-oriented courses, joint educational and technical initiatives, and practical learning opportunities to foster professional growth within the student community.
imageAlt: MOU signing between Islamian Computing Society (IIUI) and Combine Foundation

title: Quants Society (NED University) X Combine Foundation MOU
paragraphs: Quants Society represents students of the Computational Finance department at NED University of Engineering and Technology, aiming to enhance technical and professional growth opportunities for its members. This partnership provides skill-based learning opportunities, promoting future-aligned technical education in Computational Finance.

The collaboration focuses on offering merit-based free or discounted access to Combine Foundation's advanced training programs, workshops, and webinars, specifically in the areas of Python, AI, Web Development, Shopify, and WordPress.
imageAlt: MOU signing between Quants Society (NED University) and Combine Foundation

title: Hammad Foundation X Combine Foundation MOU
paragraphs: Hammad Foundation is a valued community partner collaborating with Combine Foundation to serve the community in areas of social welfare, educational access, and environmental awareness. This partnership is established to combine resources for the upliftment of students and underprivileged communities.

The primary focus is bridging the financial gap for deserving students by providing access to quality learning and web development training, co-developing training modules, and hosting joint student outreach sessions to foster a cleaner, greener, and more educated society.
imageAlt: MOU signing between Hammad Foundation and Combine Foundation

title: NED Girls Affairs Society (NGAS) X Combine Foundation MOU
paragraphs: NED Girls' Affairs Society (NGAS) is a student-led organization at NED University dedicated to women empowerment, leadership development, and community engagement. This collaboration is established to empower female students through skill-based learning, mentorship, and professional development opportunities.

Both parties work together to co-organize workshops related to digital skills, professional development, and community outreach, providing free course enrollment opportunities to selected NGAS members and designing customized training programs aligned with their educational needs.
imageAlt: MOU signing between NED Girls Affairs Society (NGAS) and Combine Foundation

title: Sindh Madressatul Islam University (SMIU) X Combine Foundation MOU
paragraphs: Sindh Madressatul Islam University (SMIU) and Combine Foundation have entered into a partnership to establish a framework for mutual collaboration in youth development, leadership training, internships, and community engagement initiatives.

The collaboration provides SMIU students with training and skill development programs in emerging technologies, AI automation, and professional development, alongside internship pipelines, joint workshops, seminars, and project-based learning opportunities.
imageAlt: MOU signing between Sindh Madressatul Islam University (SMIU) and Combine Foundation
